description_long: This is a military combat vehicle with a low, angular profile and a rotating turret mounted centrally on its hull. The vehicle is painted in a solid olive drab color, with no visible camouflage or markings. Its hull features sloped armor panels, ventilation grilles on the engine deck, and a prominent cannon extending from the turret. The vehicle moves on continuous metal tracks with multiple road wheels and return rollers, providing high mobility over rough terrain. There are visible hatches and periscopes on the turret, as well as towing hooks and other utilitarian fixtures on the hull. The overall design emphasizes protection, firepower, and mobility, typical of armored fighting vehicles used in urban and battlefield environments.
description: A solid olive drab armored combat vehicle with a central rotating turret, sloped armor, and metal tracks for mobility.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped glacis plate, central turret, and the main cannon pointing forward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the tracks, road wheels, and the turret with its cannon extending to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the turret, engine deck grilles, and the rear armor plate.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the tracks, wheels, and turret with cannon extending to the right.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the central turret; no additional weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with sloped armor plating, especially prominent on the front and turret; thickness appears substantial, typical of armored vehicles.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; solid olive drab color.
